revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:鉢かづき, en:Hachikazuki); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>BD2412]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hachikazuki here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hachikazuki for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/18928117 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:鉢かづき | revid=18928117 --> == 記事名の仮名遣いについて == 確かにwebでは"かづき"の表現の方が多いですが、 現代仮名遣いでは、「鉢かずき」にするべきではないでしょうか--[[User:Gepagepa|Gepagepa]] 2008年3月28日 (金) 15:04 (UTC) :本文読みました??--'''[[User:曼珠沙華|manju]][[利用者‐会話:曼珠沙華|shage]]''' 2008年3月28日 (金) 15:35 (UTC) :もちろん読んでいます。 「被き」なら現代仮名遣いなら「かずき」ではないかと言うことなんですが。もちろん旧仮名遣いなら「鉢かづき」であることは理解しています--[[User:Gepagepa|Gepagepa]] 2008年3月28日 (金) 17:05 (UTC) 記事名の仮名遣いについては、「[[Wikipedia‐ノート:スタイルマニュアル]]」でも議論されていましたが、どちらの仮名遣いにするべき、というのは決まっていないようですね。というわけで取り下げます。 :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1207173799 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:43, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Hachikazuki | revid=1207173799 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Articles for creation|ts=20210725145229|reviewer=AntanO|oldid=1035343142}} {{WikiProject Japan |importance=Low}} {{WikiProject Literature |importance=Low}} {{WikiProject Folklore |importance=Low}} }}
